params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste (kitchen). Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, clear counters with minimal ceramics, wood cutting board, visible connection to dining bay, warm under-cabinet practicals (if visible). Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, uncluttered Japandi interior that balances Scandinavian restraint with Japanese warmth. Warm neutrals, light oak, and sculptural minimal furniture create a grounded, family-friendly environment. Prioritize a cozy standing-desk work corner in the main living area, low-profile seating, and textured natural materials. Maintain visible-source lighting logic and faithful architecture in all outputs. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
